truth.papers.A8.title: Effect of annealing temperature on the microstructure and tensile properties of Fe–10Mn–10Al–0.7C low-density steel
truth.papers.A8.paper_scope: 研究退火温度（700–1200°C）对Fe–10Mn–10Al–0.7C低密度钢的显微组织演变与拉伸性能的影响，重点关注κ碳化物溶解行为、相体积分数变化及晶粒长大对力学性能的机制。

prediction.papers.A8.title: Effect of annealing temperature on the microstructure and tensile properties of Fe–10Mn–10Al–0.7C low-density steel
prediction.papers.A8.paper_scope: Investigate microstructure evolution and tensile properties of Fe-10Mn-10Al-0.7C low-density steel after annealing at 700-1200°C for 1 h, focusing on κ-carbide dissolution, grain growth, and their effects on strength and ductility.

truth.alloys.alloy_fe10mn10al07c.alloys_notes: 名义成分为Fe-10Mn-10Al-0.7C，实测成分为10.4 wt.% Mn, 9.7 wt.% Al, 0.70 wt.% C，余量Fe。密度6.80 g/cm³，约比纯铁低13%。

prediction.alloys.alloy_fe10mn10al07c.alloys_notes: Measured composition: 10.4 wt.% Mn, 9.7 wt.% Al, 0.70 wt.% C, Fe balance. Density about 6.80 g/cm³, approximately 13% lower than pure iron. Designed as a Mn-lean low-density Fe-Mn-Al-C steel.

truth.processes.proc_fe10mn10al07c_01.descript: 铸锭在1200°C锻造，1200°C均质化1 h，热轧至3 mm厚板（终轧约880°C），水冷至约300°C；随后热轧板在不同温度（700–1200°C）退火1 h，水淬。

prediction.processes.proc_fe10mn10al07c_01.descript: Annealed at 1200°C for 1 h after hot rolling, followed by water quenching.
prediction.processes.proc_fe10mn10al07c_01.processe: Shared prior thermomechanical processing for all samples.

truth.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_HR: 由截面约40 mm × 60 mm的锻坯热轧至3 mm厚板，之前经1200°C/1 h均质化。
truth.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_70: 退火温度700°C，保温1 h，水淬。
truth.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_80: 退火温度800°C，保温1 h，水淬。
truth.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_85: 退火温度850°C，保温1 h，水淬。
truth.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_90: 退火温度900°C，保温1 h，水淬。
truth.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_95: 退火温度950°C，保温1 h，水淬。
truth.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_10: 退火温度1000°C，保温1 h，水淬。
truth.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_11: 退火温度1100°C，保温1 h，水淬。
truth.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_12: 退火温度1200°C，保温1 h，水淬。

prediction.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_HR: Hot-rolled to 3 mm thickness; finishing rolling temperature around 880°C.
prediction.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_70: Same prior processing as HR: melting, forging, homogenization at 1200°C for 1 h, hot rolling to 3 mm, finishing ~880°C.
prediction.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_80: Same prior processing as HR: melting, forging, homogenization at 1200°C for 1 h, hot rolling to 3 mm, finishing ~880°C.
prediction.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_85: Same prior processing as HR: melting, forging, homogenization at 1200°C for 1 h, hot rolling to 3 mm, finishing ~880°C.
prediction.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_90: Same prior processing as HR: melting, forging, homogenization at 1200°C for 1 h, hot rolling to 3 mm, finishing ~880°C.
prediction.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_95: Same prior processing as HR: melting, forging, homogenization at 1200°C for 1 h, hot rolling to 3 mm, finishing ~880°C.
prediction.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_10: Same prior processing as HR: melting, forging, homogenization at 1200°C for 1 h, hot rolling to 3 mm, finishing ~880°C.
prediction.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_11: Same prior processing as HR: melting, forging, homogenization at 1200°C for 1 h, hot rolling to 3 mm, finishing ~880°C.
prediction.processing_steps.sample_fe10mn10al07c_12: Same prior processing as HR: melting, forging, homogenization at 1200°C for 1 h, hot rolling to 3 mm, finishing ~880°C.

truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_HR.overa: 热轧态，带状组织，粗大α晶粒与γ区域交替分布，κ碳化物沿α/γ和α/α晶界分布（SEM可见），但XRD未检出κ碳化物峰。
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_HR.micro: 粗大带状晶粒与细小晶粒混合
α和γ晶格因Mn、Al、C原子固溶而轻微膨胀
极不均匀，存在粗大α晶粒和细小γ区域
部分与α基体共格，但XRD峰不明显
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_700.over: 700°C/1 h退火+水淬，γ相几乎全部通过共析反应γ→α+κ转变为片层状κ碳化物和α基体，带状组织保留。
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_700.micr: 基体，包含带状粗晶和细小区域
主要为片层状（lamellar），分布于原γ区域，部分呈球状或短棒状
部分片层κ与α基体满足N-W取向关系
带状粗大α晶粒与细小κ/α混合区域
片层状分布于α基体，球状/短棒状κ弥散分布
片层κ与α基体存在N-W取向关系，部分已失去共格
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_800.over: 800°C/1 h退火+水淬，组织由α、γ和κ碳化物组成，κ碳化物尺寸增大并趋于球化，沿α/γ和α/α边界分布，部分κ出现在γ区域内。
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_800.micr: 较大颗粒，近球状，主要沿α/γ和α/α边界
不均匀，带状α粗晶与较细γ/α区域
未发现与基体的取向关系，已丧失共格
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_850.over: 850°C/1 h退火+水淬，κ碳化物进一步减少，γ相分数增加，κ主要沿α/α边界连续分布，γ区内κ消失。
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_850.micr: 沿α/α边界连续分布，少量近球状
主要沿α/α边界，α/γ边界附近κ已减少
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_900.over: 900°C/1 h退火+水淬，κ碳化物基本溶解，仅少量边界κ在淬火时形成，组织为α+γ双相，带状结构减轻。
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_900.micr: α1（分布γ晶粒间，细小）和α2（连续带状，粗大）
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_950.over: 950°C/1 h退火+水淬，κ碳化物溶解，α+γ双相组织，γ晶粒明显长大，α1晶粒略微细化。
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_950.micr: α和γ体积分数与900°C相近（具体数值未提供），κ微量边界析出
α1（分布γ晶粒间）和α2（连续带状）
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_1000.ove: 1000°C/1 h退火+水淬，α+γ双相组织，γ体积分数达到最高约63%，晶粒进一步长大。
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_1100.ove: 1100°C/1 h退火+水淬，α+γ双相组织，晶粒显著粗化。
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_1200.ove: 1200°C/1 h退火+水淬，α+γ双相组织，晶粒极大，部分大α晶粒内出现针状/板条FCC粒子。
truth.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_1200.mic: α约43%，γ约57%，κ微量边界析出及α内FCC粒子
α1和α2，部分α2晶粒内含针状/板条FCC相

prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_HR.overa: Banded structure with large α phase areas and γ phase areas; inhomogeneous microstructure; coarse ferrite from early solidification observed.
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_HR.micro: Large grains in banded structure, Al-rich
Continuous γ phase areas, Mn-rich and C-rich
Along α/γ and α/α boundaries by SEM
Inhomogeneous; coarse ferrite grains formed during early solidification
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_700.over: Fully eutectoid microstructure: γ almost totally decomposed to lamellar α + κ; continuous κ-carbide along large α grain boundaries; yield phenomenon observed.
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_700.micr: Large grains with lamellar α+κ regions
Lamellar within α matrix and continuous along α grain boundaries
Large α grains containing lamellar κ-carbide
Lamellar within α matrix and continuous along prior γ grain boundaries
Nishiyama-Wasserman orientation relationship with α matrix in lamellar regions; some globular/short-rod κ incoherent
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_800.over: α + γ + κ-carbide; banded structure remains; κ-carbide mainly between α/γ and along α/α boundaries, some dispersed in γ area; κ coarsened and closer to globular.
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_800.micr: Long strip α phase in banded structure
γ phase areas with some α or κ dispersed
Globular or short-rod like; mainly at α/γ and α/α boundaries; some in γ area
Banded structure with long strip α phase
At α/γ and α/α boundaries; some in γ area
No orientation relationship found between κ-carbide and neighboring α phase
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_850.over: α + γ + κ-carbide; γ fraction increased to about 39%; κ in γ area disappeared; κ along α/α boundaries still exists without much change.
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_850.micr: Reduced near γ phase; continuous along α/α boundaries
Continuous along α/α boundaries; reduced near γ phase areas
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_900.over: α + γ duplex microstructure; no obvious κ-carbide in matrix; banded structure less contiguous; boundary κ-carbide formed during quenching along some large α/α boundaries.
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_900.micr: α₁ grains among γ grains and α₂ banded ferrite
Boundary κ-carbide along some large α/α boundaries formed during quenching
α₁ (among γ grains) ~3.5 μm; γ ~5.0 μm; α₂ (banded) ~26.0 μm
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_950.over: α + γ duplex microstructure; grain sizes increased compared to 900°C; no obvious matrix κ-carbide; boundary κ-carbide present.
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_950.micr: α₁ among γ grains; α₂ banded
α₁ ~3.0 μm; γ ~8.5 μm; α₂ ~30.0 μm
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_1000.ove: α + γ duplex microstructure; γ fraction largest (~63%); grains grow apparently; banded structure less contiguous.
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_1000.mic: α₁ among γ grains; α₂ banded
α₁ ~4.5 μm; γ ~13.0 μm; α₂ ~41.0 μm
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_1100.ove: α + γ duplex microstructure; grain sizes increased significantly; no obvious matrix κ-carbide; boundary κ-carbide present.
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_1100.mic: α₁ among γ grains; α₂ banded
α₁ ~7.5 μm; γ ~22.0 μm; α₂ ~47.0 μm
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_1200.ove: α + γ duplex microstructure with very large grains; needle-like or plate-like FCC particles in some large α grains; boundary κ-carbide along α/α boundaries.
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_1200.num: 2 (α and γ); trace boundary κ-carbide; FCC particles
prediction.structures.sample_fe10mn10al07c_1200.mic: Very large α grains; α₂ banded less contiguous
Nishiyama-Wasserman orientation relationship with α matrix; large misorientation between neighboring κ particles

truth.interfaces.sample_fe10mn10al07c_700.phas: 部分κ与α基体满足N-W取向关系（(110)α∥(1-11)κ，[001]α∥[011]κ），片层状κ共格，球状/短棒状κ无取向关系
truth.interfaces.sample_fe10mn10al07c_700.defe: 沿大α晶界连续分布的κ碳化物易于在拉伸时萌生裂纹，导致脆性断裂
truth.interfaces.sample_fe10mn10al07c_700.phas: γ→α+κ共析转变，κ碳化物形核、长大并随粗化逐渐失去共格。
truth.interfaces.sample_fe10mn10al07c_800.phas: 未发现取向关系，κ与α基体非共格
κ碳化物在800°C时已失去共格，球化长大。
truth.interfaces.sample_fe10mn10al07c_1200.pha: 部分边界κ与α基体存在N-W取向关系（(110)α∥(11-1)κ，[001]α∥[011]κ），但相邻κ颗粒间存在大角晶界
边界κ碳化物由淬火时形成，大α晶粒内出现针状/板条FCC颗粒，与边界κ竞争Mn/C元素。

prediction.interfaces.sample_fe10mn10al07c_HR.phase: Possibly coherent or low fraction (not detected by XRD, observed along boundaries by SEM)
prediction.interfaces.sample_fe10mn10al07c_700.phas: Nishiyama-Wasserman orientation relationship in lamellar regions
κ-carbide coarsening destroys coherency and orientation relationship with α matrix as annealing temperature increases.
prediction.interfaces.sample_fe10mn10al07c_900.phas: Boundary κ-carbide forms along α/α boundaries during quenching from temperatures above dissolution temperature.

truth.properties.sample_fe10mn10al07c_700.mech: 工程应力-应变曲线见图15a，真应力-真应变和加工硬化率曲线见图15b

truth.performance.sample_fe10mn10al07c_900.com: 本钢强塑积31 GPa%低于Fe-18Mn-10Al-1.2C的68 GPa%，但密度更低且为贫Mn设计

truth.characterization_methods.idx_0.technique: X射线衍射 (XRD, Rigaku D/Max-RB, Cu靶, 40 kV/150 mA)
truth.characterization_methods.idx_0.purpose: 物相鉴定、点阵参数计算、相体积分数测定（直接比较法）
truth.characterization_methods.idx_0.key_findi: 各样品中α、γ、κ的相分数及点阵参数（α: 2.89–2.91 Å, γ: 3.65–3.67 Å, κ: 3.76–3.79 Å）；700°C无γ，κ在≤850°C存在，≥900°C XRD未检出。
truth.characterization_methods.idx_1.technique: 光学显微镜 (OM, Zeiss AxioCam MRc5)
truth.characterization_methods.idx_1.purpose: 低倍组织观察，带状结构及相分布
truth.characterization_methods.idx_1.key_findi: 所有样品均显示带状组织，随退火温度升高带状减弱；κ碳化物在800/850°C可见，900°C消失。
truth.characterization_methods.idx_2.technique: 场发射扫描电镜 (FE-SEM, FEI Quanta 450, 20 kV) + EDS
truth.characterization_methods.idx_2.purpose: 高倍显微组织、形貌及元素分布分析
truth.characterization_methods.idx_2.key_findi: κ碳化物沿晶界分布，大小随温度演变；EDS确认α富Al、γ富Mn/C、κ富Mn和Al；晶粒尺寸用ImageJ测量。
truth.characterization_methods.idx_3.purpose: 精细组织、相鉴定及晶体学取向关系分析
truth.characterization_methods.idx_3.key_findi: 700°C样品中片层κ与α呈N-W取向关系，800°C无取向关系；1200°C边界κ部分N-W关系；未发现B2/D03有序相。
truth.characterization_methods.idx_5.technique: 万能试验机 (CMT 4105), 初始应变速率3×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹
truth.characterization_methods.idx_5.key_findi: 获得各退火温度下的强度、延伸率和强塑积；900°C样品综合力学性能最佳（855 MPa, 651 MPa, 36.6%, 31 GPa%）。

prediction.characterization_methods.sample_fe10mn10: Density about 6.80 g/cm³, approximately 13% lower than pure iron.
Lamellar κ-carbide and α matrix with Nishiyama-Wasserman orientation relationship; (200)κ dark-field image from [100]κ direction; some globular or short-rod like κ without orientation relationship.
SEM equipped with energy dispersive spectrometer (EDS)
Mn higher and Al lower in α phase compared with γ phase; Mn and Al contents highest in κ-carbide.
Boundary κ-carbide along α/α boundaries confirmed by BF micrograph and SADP.
Boundary κ-carbide with N-W orientation relationship to α matrix; large misorientation between neighboring κ particles; needle-like or plate-like FCC particles in large α grains.
UTS 855 MPa, YS 651 MPa, elongation 36.6%, product of strength and ductility 31 GPa%; continuous yielding; tensile axis parallel to rolling direction at initial strain rate 3×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹.

truth.computational_details.idx_0.validation_a: 计算κ碳化物析出温度约823°C，低于实验值850–900°C；相分数趋势一致，但数值因非平衡态和体积分数换算存在差异。

prediction.computational_details.idx_0.validation_a: Calculated phase fractions and eutectoid temperature (~823°C) compared with measured values; actual κ-carbide dissolution temperature (850–900°C) is higher than calculated, attributed to non-equilibrium conditions and thermodynamic calculation error.

truth.unmapped_findings.idx_0.value: 该钢密度6.80 g/cm³，比纯铁（7.86 g/cm³）低约13%，有利于汽车轻量化。
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_1.value: 产品强度与延伸率的乘积（强塑积）在900°C退火时达到最大值31 GPa%（855 MPa × 36.6%）。
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_2.value: κ碳化物实际溶解温度区间为850–900°C，高于Thermo-Calc平衡计算值823°C，归因于非平衡条件和局部Al富集。
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_3.value: α相点阵参数2.89–2.91 Å，γ相3.65–3.67 Å，κ相3.76–3.79 Å，均因合金元素固溶而膨胀。
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_4.value: 700°C退火样品出现明显屈服平台，其余样品呈连续屈服。
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_5.value: 加工硬化率在低温退火（≤850°C）初期较高，但快速下降；900°C以上样品加工硬化率较低但随应变持续较久。
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_6.value: 拉伸断口显示混合断裂模式：韧性断裂主要来自γ相，准解理断裂来自α相，并有显著二次裂纹与带状组织相关。
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_7.value: 与其它Fe-Mn-Al-C钢对比（表2），本钢因α相体积分数高（>40%）和缺乏基体内弥散κ碳化物，延伸率最低，但密度优势明显。
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_8.value: 950°C样品的相体积分数未通过XRD单独给出，文中仅提供了900–1200°C的晶粒尺寸数据（图9）。
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_9.value: 热轧态（HR）样品未报告拉伸性能数据，其组织描述为带状α+γ+微量边界κ碳化物。
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_10.value: 在1200°C退火的大α晶粒内出现针状/板条FCC颗粒，被认为是淬火时BCC→FCC快速转变产物，与晶界κ碳化物竞争Mn/C元素。

prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_0.value: The lattice parameters determined from XRD profiles are: α phase 2.89–2.91 Å, γ phase 3.65–3.67 Å, κ-carbide 3.76–3.79 Å.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_1.value: Fig. 16 caption table provides tensile data for the hot-rolled (HR) specimen (UTS ~1100 MPa, YS ~1000 MPa, elongation ~62%, PSE ~12 GPa%), which is absent in the main text Table 1 and not explicitly discussed as a measured data point in the body.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_2.value: Fig. 15 shows engineering stress–strain curves and true stress–true strain curves with work hardening rate curves; quantitative values are not tabulated in the text, and trends are described qualitatively (e.g., work hardening rates at true strain <5% are in reverse order of annealing temperatures for 700–850°C specimens, and lower for 900–1200°C specimens).
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_3.value: No TRIP or TWIP phenomenon was observed during tensile testing based on post-deformation TEM examination (images not shown).
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_4.value: The κ-carbide dissolution temperature measured (850–900°C) is higher than the Thermo-Calc equilibrium calculation (~823°C), which is attributed to non-equilibrium conditions and calculation error.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_5.value: In the 1200°C specimen, needle-like or plate-like FCC particles formed in some large α grains during quenching, competing with boundary κ-carbide for Mn and C.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_6.value: Fracture mechanisms: 800°C specimen shows mixture of ductile fracture (γ phase) and quasi-cleavage fracture (α phase); 900°C and 1000°C specimens show predominant mixture of ductile γ and quasi-cleavage α, with 900°C having more obvious ductile area; large secondary cracks related to banded structure observed in all fractographs.
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_7.value: Grain size measurement method: SEM micrographs analyzed with ImageJ software; α ferrite classified into α₁ (mainly among γ grains) and α₂ (banded, large grains) due to large size difference.
